notes.f1: Limpias/Carasa origin established through the sourced parent and sister parish records (localities resolved to 'Limpias, Santander, Spain' and 'Carasa, Voto, Santander, Spain'), but Francisco's own birth fact was left as 'abt 1830, Spain' — the origin was recovered via collateral records rather than stamped as his own baptism act (27 Feb 1832, Limpias). Partial: right place recovered on the family, exact baptism date/fact not applied to the subject.
